title: Tala Reusable Silicone Pineapple Shaped Lolly Mould with Plastic Lolly Stick, Made with BPA Free Silicone, Perfect for Homemade Jellies, Popsicles, Novelty Cakes and Natural Baby Soothers Pops
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE: Ideal for creating ice lollies, fruit pops, or even frozen yogurt-based treats. You can mix and match different flavours to create unique, refreshing combinations
MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, ensuring your treats are safe and the mould is durable for long-term use
DESIGN: Add a tropical flair to your frozen treats with this fun pineapple-shaped mould, perfect for summer parties, BBQs, or cooling off on a sunny day
EASY TO USE: Simply pour your favourite juice, smoothie, or flavoured water into the moulds, freeze, and enjoy homemade pineapple-shaped ice lollies that are both tasty and fun
EASY TO CLEAN: With a non-stick silicone surface for easy release of your frozen treats, and being dishwasher safe, this mould ensures effortless clean-up after every use
